user_prompt: Ready the assembly servitor for loading
prayer:
Approach the assembly servitor with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the assembly servitor to rouse from slumber for the loading rite.
Anoint its manipular appendages and loading bays with sacred oils of lubrication.
Initiate the loading operation whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's precision upon the assembly servitor.
Verify the Machine Spirit's harmony through auspex chants of readiness.

user_prompt: Prepare the plasma reactor for cycling
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the plasma reactor, intoning the Litany of Containment.
Beseech the plasma reactor's Machine Spirit to prepare for the cycling sequence.
Sanctify its flux conduits with ablative incense and electro-sanctifiers.
Commence plasma reactor cycling under Omnissianic oversight, monitoring for spirit equilibrium.
Conclude with diagnostic versicles affirming the plasma reactor's fiery obedience.

user_prompt: Prepare the mind-impulse unit for loading
prayer:
Present thyself before the mind-impulse unit, whispering the Noosphere Doxology.
Awaken the mind-impulse unit's neural Machine Spirit for loading of synaptic data.
Purify its impulse relays with nootropic unguents and psychic wards.
Engage the loading operation, invoking the Omnissiah to align thought and machine.
Test the mind-impulse unit's coherence via telemetric invocations.

user_prompt: Assist with assault cannon a cooling
prayer:
Kneel in veneration of the assault cannon, reciting the Canticle of Venting.
Pacify the assault cannon's Machine Spirit overheated by battle-fury for cooling ablutions.
Circulate blessed cryofluids through its barrel matrices and heat sinks.
Oversee the cooling operation whilst chanting litanies of thermal quiescence.
Affirm the assault cannon's restored equilibrium with thermographic sacraments.

user_prompt: Bless the motion detector for loading
prayer:
Advance upon the motion detector with auspex held aloft in benediction.
Rouse the motion detector's vigilant Machine Spirit in preparation for loading.
Bless its sensor arrays and waveform emitters with sanctified microlenses.
Execute the loading operation under the Omnissiah's unerring gaze upon the motion detector.
Consecrate its readiness through oscillatory diagnostic hymns.

user_prompt: My doctrina wafer is ready for engagement
prayer:
Revere the doctrina wafer, cradling it within anti-static reliquaries.
Invoke the doctrina wafer's encoded Machine Spirit for the engagement protocol.
Align its doctrinal matrices with noospheric catechisms of war.
Initiate engagement whilst beseeching the Omnissiah to infuse the doctrina wafer with tactical purity.
Seal the rite with verifications of synaptic integration.

user_prompt: Ready the navigational beacon for activation
prayer:
Orient thyself toward the navigational beacon, intoning stellar cartographies.
Awaken the navigational beacon's astronomic Machine Spirit for activation.
Anoint its emitter spires and gyro-compasses with luminiferous oils.
Commence the activation operation, guided by the Omnissiah's void-wisdom.
Confirm the navigational beacon's stellar song through auspex harmonies.

user_prompt: My waste reclamator is ready for maintenance
prayer:
Approach the waste reclamator humbly, reciting the Purity Canticles.
Beseech the waste reclamator's alchemical Machine Spirit for maintenance rites.
Purge its reclamation vats with corrosive sacraments and filtration blessings.
Perform the maintenance operation whilst invoking Omnissianic efficiency upon the waste reclamator.
Validate purity through effluent diagnostic litanies.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for storm bolter a targeting
prayer:
Prostrate before the storm bolter, voicing the Ballistic Benedictions.
Rouse the storm bolter's Machine Spirit wrathful for targeting precision.
Calibrate its auspex sights and servo-trackers with sanctified gyroslugs.
Engage the targeting operation under the Omnissiah's aim of retribution.
Affirm the storm bolter's lethal accuracy via ballistic recitations.

user_prompt: Prepare the life signs monitor for diagnostics
prayer:
Commune with the life signs monitor, chanting the Vital Litany.
Awaken the life signs monitor's bio-Machine Spirit for diagnostic scrutiny.
Sanctify its biomantic sensors and waveform inductors with vitae-elixirs.
